issues.description: KO action missing condition on maxCost. Should be dynamic: maxCost = (your Life cards + opponent's Life cards). Current static maxCost:20 is incorrect.
FlipLife action missing conditional check. Should only trigger 'if you have 1 or less Life cards'. Current DSL has no condition branch.
Second action (FlipLife) requires condition 'HasAttachedDon' with value ≤1 to represent 'if you have 1 or less Life cards'. Missing from DSL.
